titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Tony Geiss Papers
titlestmt.author: by Beinecke staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

controlnote.p: This finding aid, which is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0., has a MARC record in Yale's ILS with the following bib number: XXXXXXXXX.

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday March 30, 2018 at 19:09

did.unittitle: Tony Geiss papers

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Writings, notebooks, scripts, files, awards, audiovisual material, stuffed animals, printed material, and other papers relating to Tony Geiss and his work on Sesame Street and other television and film projects.

did.unittitle: Notebooks

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Notebooks, legal pads, typescripts, and other manuscript material, including some corresondence. Consists primarily of working notes for scripts and songs, talks and recollections, as well as to do lists and schedules.

did.unittitle: Sesame Street papers
Script files
Script materials

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Fragmentary manuscript notes, typescripts, annotated photocopy schedules, and memos to Sesame Street writers, song lyrics

did.unittitle: Script materials

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Notes, typescripts, working drafts, shooting scripts, memos, and correspondence.

did.unittitle: Script materials

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Notes, typescripts, working drafts, shooting scripts, memos, and correspondence.

did.unittitle: Scripts
Scripts
Scripts
Scripts
Sesame Street scripts, seasons 28-30; Elmo's World scripts, seasons 31-32
Season 33 scripts for Sesame Street and Elmo's World
Season 34 scripts for of Sesame Street and Elmo's World
Elmo's World scripts
Elmo's World scripts
Scripts for Seasons 37 and 38 of Sesame Street and Elmo's World
Scripts for Seasons 37 and 39 of Sesame Street and Elmo's World
Sesame Street scripts, seasons 38-40
Elmo's World scripts
Elmo's World scripts
Bound Sesame Street scripts
Specials and films

Sesame St: A Night at the Metropolitan; Follow That Bird; Don't Eat the Pictures; Encyclopedia; Big Bird in Japan; Sing!; OTC Notes; The Tokyo String Quartet; The Alpha Thieves; Policy Song for Sony Theatres; The Best of Kermit on Sesame Street; CinderElmo.
Lloyd Morrisset Retrospective; The Furry Arms; The Best of Me / The Best of Grover; Bernice / The Great Pigeon Chase; Daisy; Mrs. Sparklenose's Flying Fairy School; Between the Lions; Theo Cleo
Unproduced special Sesame Street Discovers America
Jim Henson materials
Muppet inserts, files, Henson special
Project files

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Development materials for Abby Cadabby, various other projects.

did.unittitle: Children's Television Workshop reference and research materials

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Muppet character descriptions, Joan Ganz Cooney material, curriculum materials, internal memos, resource guides, set guides, promotional photos, workshop predictions, and research materials.

did.unittitle: Songs and compositions
Scripts, correspondence, manuscript lyrics and manuscript music, notes, lead sheets, recording session logs, storyboards and copyright material
Scripts, correspondence, manuscript lyrics and manuscript music, notes, lead sheets, recording session logs, storyboards and copyright material
Animated features
An American Tail, The Land Before Time Began, The Tale of Peter Rabbit
Meet Fievel
Early comedy and sketch writing
The David Frost Show
The David Frost Show
The David Frost Show
The David Frost Show; The Robert Klein Show; The Dick Cavett Show; Not the Network News; The David Letterman Show
Unidentified writings, including annotated scripts
Cos, Ivan the Terrible, Robert Klein special, Tap Happening, 13 Stars for 13, When Things Were Rotten
Unrealized projects
Ball Four; Navy Brat / Operation Amanda; Oh Kay!; Wall Street By Night; After Rehearsal; Language Review; One Reel; Woof!
Working Draft material, various projects, The Velveteen Rabbit
Notes, drafts, and final versions of identifiable independent projects and collaborations
Notes, drafts, and final versions of independent projects and collaborations, largely unidentifiable
Scripts of others

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Scripts include The Web, The Bones of Danny Winston and Rib Ann McGee, Character, and Cocoon: The Musical.

did.unittitle: Personal papers
Marjorie Geiss papers

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, legal documents, film promotional material, and other papers by, to, or relating to Tony Geiss's mother Marjorie Geiss.

did.unittitle: Corresondence, appointment book, personal and finacial papers, film still, undeveloped disposable camera
Printed materials

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Miscellaneous printed material and clippings.

did.unittitle: Awards

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Awards and related documentation, including Emmys, the Prix Jeunesse International, and others.

did.unittitle: Awards and related materials
Prix Jeunesse International, Munchen 1984
Awards
Memorabilia
Keychains, ID badges, stationary, printed material
Sesame Street posters
Sesame Street crew jackets
Sesame Street stuffed animals
Land Before Time stuffed animals
Stuffed Fievel
Stuffed Fievel
Audiovisual materials
Videocassettes
Children's Television Workshop, Monster Hits and Silly Songs, Rock and Roll, CTW 069336
Children's Television Workshop, Sesame Street Video, "Sing, Hoot, and Howl," CTW 085736
Children's Television Workshop, Sing Yourself Silly, Monster Hits, dup 10/89, CTW 062381
did.materialspec: At 00:04:39 to 00:07:52, the video goes in and out of the segment.

did.unittitle: Children's Television Workshop, PregnancyL Henson Hour, dup 11/21/98, CTW 065094
did.materialspec: The audio has background noise over the dialogue.

did.unittitle: Children's Television Workshop, Dance Along, dup 2/90
Children's Television Workshop, Selected International Segments for Henson Special, approximately 35:00, dup 10/10/88
Children's Television Workshop, Perennial Education, New Lives, dup 8/2/88
Children's Television Workshop, Sing/Raposo Tribute, tape 12 w/VRO, dup 2/9/90
did.materialspec: A time code runs through the bottom of the video.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: There is an interview with Jim Henson.

did.unittitle: Children's Television Workshop, The Henson Hour, Life Segments, reel#2, dup 11/30/88
did.materialspec: A time code runs through a small portion of the video.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A list of segments for "The Henson Hour" are included. The producer is Nina Elias.

list.head: Life Segments Reel #2
list.item: 1. Big Bad Wolf and Air; Show #2552; Item #15A, Take 5
2. Big Bad Wolf and Air; Show #2552; Item #15B, Take 1
3. Big Bad Wolf and Air; Show #2552; Item #15C, Take 1
4. Telly and Oscar - "Love"; Show #2123; Sibling Rivalry
6. B.B. Learns that Maria is Pregnant; Pregnancy: Henson Hour

did.unittitle: Children's Television Workshop, Joe Raposo Interview, musicians, tapes 1,2,3 w/vro, dup 2/90
did.materialspec: A time code runs along the bottom of the video.

did.unittitle: Children's Television Workshop, Tony Geiss Lyric Reel, dup 3/19/87

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: There is a list of segments included.

list.head: SESAME STREET SEGMENTS
list.item: "DON'T BE AFRAID TO TRY SOMETHING NEW"
"YOU CAN BE ANYTHING YOU WANT TO"

did.unittitle: Children's Television Workshop, Sesame Street, Muppet/Kids segments, dup 9/30/88
Children's Television Workshop, Silly Songs and Monster Hits, Silly Dancing, dup 8/7/89
Children's Television Workshop, Sesame Street at the Door, dup 1/17/89
Spitting Image show reel, copy of U-matic
Children's Television Workshop, Sales film, Joan Cooney intro, Clips promo, RL #14 sales film, dup 4/8/88
did.materialspec: The first 43 minutes is a poor, quality film transfer of Sesame Street demo. The rest is of good quality.

did.unittitle: Children's Television Workshop, Sesame Street Show #1, dup 9/13/88

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Video includes: "Amigo Friend", "Little Plant Song", "What a Gift" and "Proud of Me".

did.unittitle: Children's Television Workshop, Joe Raposo Instrumentals
did.materialspec: There is an occassional time code noise in the soundtrack. A receipt of the dub is also included with the tape.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Included with the tape is a list of segments Tony Geiss included in the dub. The last entry is not on the tape.

did.unittitle: Best of Kermit, off-line, temp.titles, temp.mix
did.materialspec: There's a time code that runs through the bottom of the video.

did.unittitle: Children's Television Workshop, Sesame Street show#3683, 60:00
Children's Television Workshop, Cinderelmo, locked cut #2 with Act 1 patch V510 (not split) (For viewing cassettes only_ TRT:47:10, Audio channel 1 and channel 2 parallel mono
Sesame Workshop, Elmo's World Dinosaurs, full rez, 15:53
Children's Television Workshop, Goodnight Moon and other Sleepytime Tales, TRT 26:36
Children's Television Workshop, song segments by Tony Geiss, season 26
Children's Television Workshop, Sesame Street songs (parade), dupe 5/21/89
Children's Television Workshop, Elmo Saves Christmas, PBS Version, dupe 7/12/96
Children's Television Workshop, 11 songs
did.materialspec: The audio track does drop out, but it is listenable.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1. What a Gift; 2. Little Plant Song; 3. Every Bit O Litter Hurts; 3. Just Throw it My Way; 5. Box City Recycle Rap; 6. Keep Park Clean for Pigeons; 7. Water Pollution Song; 8. Air Mana Mana; 9. Oscars Junk Band; 10. Wasteroon Song; 11. On My Pond

did.unittitle: Children's Television Workshop, Kermit compilation reel, master reel needs to be edited (III songs, etc.)
Children's Television Workshop, Sesame Street, Slimey the Worm segments, Shows 3579, 3300, 3061
Children's Television Workshop, various songs

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Song: Pond Full of Fish, Litter Rap Song, Stand by Your Can, Water Pollution. Song: Love the Ocean. Song: Don't Throw Trash on the Ground; Song: Oscar Junk Band, Box City Rap, Garbage Man Blues, Keep Park Clean for Pigeons, Every Bit O Litter Hurt, Just Throw it Away; Black; Be Proud of Your Hair, Fabulous Rainbow; R. Moranis: Stranger on a Plane; Song: What a Friend w/ CM

Children's Television Workshop, Sing/Raposo Tribute, tapes 7-11, dupe 1990 February 9

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The video contains two hours of vaudeville and two Sesame Street programs.

did.unittitle: Children's Television Workshop, Unicef, Every Child Has a Right to Play, Learn, etc., 3 music videos
did.materialspec: This video contains random recordings of NBC News, Business Report, and PBS NewsHour. This video has not been digitized.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: There are contents listed on a sheet of paper from Jim Henson Productions that are included with the tape.

list.head: Dave Goelz Reel
list.item: Large Marvin, Fraggle Rock - Overweight Fraggle who eats a lot.
The World's Oldest Fraggle, Fraggle Rock
Travelling Matt, Fraggle Rock - Adventurous explorer, Gobo's Uncle.
Philo, Fraggle Rock - Small rat-like creature.
Booper, Fraggle Rock - Masquerading as a Gypsy Lady.
Gonzo, The Muppet Show (#103) - "Workin' At The Car Wash Blues"

did.unittitle: Children's Television Workshop, Sing Yourself Silly, Monster Hits, daily, dupe 1989 November

did.unittitle: "Angels in America", "Days of Our Lives"
did.materialspec: The video is poorly recorded.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Angels in America" plays For the first two hours and 50 minutes of the tape. The rest of the tape includes episodes of "Days of Our Lives".

did.materialspec: Master copy

did.unittitle: Children's Television Workshop, The Best of Kermit on Sesame Street
HBO, Babar episodes 1 and 2, "Babar's First Step" and "City Ways"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This tape also contains a portion of ABC's 20/20 program.

did.unittitle: Children's Television Workshop, Sesame Street sow #3656
Sesame Workshop, Lenny Dugout re-edited

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A note is attached to this video. It reads: Tony, There is a scratch v/o to give a sense of Grover's timing v/o. Melissa :) This note may be referencing the recording of a 'scratch track'. Scratch tracks are sync recordings used for reference only for the sound editor or actors for use in dubbing.

did.unittitle: Children's Television Workshop, Sesame Street home video, Grover's Sing Along, Earth Songs, Pigeons Gift
Children's Television Workshop, William Wegman, Sesame Street segments, 1989-1996
Sesame Workshop, "Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade," Thursday 23 9am-12pm, edited highlight version
Stephen Lawrence video clips: "Read Me A Story" (Lawrence-Geiss), S.J.L. Music
Children's Television Workshop, Rough assembly of songs by Tony Geiss, music by Geiss and others (rundown enclosed)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A rough assembly of songs by Tony Geiss are included. All lyrics and concepts by Tony Geiss. Music by TG and others as indicated in the list.

list.item: 2. You're Gonna Be a Star (from "Don't Eat the Pictures") (music, Tony Geiss)
8. Frogs in the Glen (music, Tony Geiss)
10. Broken and Beautiful (music, Stephen J. Lawrence)
15. Mothers and Children (from "Don't Eat the Pictures")(music, Stephen J. Lawrence)

did.unittitle: Children's Television Workshop, Tony Geiss lyric reel, master assembly

scopecontent.p: There is a list of contents included with the tape.

list.head: Tony Geiss Lyric Reel
list.item: 2. Alone in a Swamp with You
7. Sister is a Big Girl Now

Electronic media
